{# Documentation Type Switcher Component - Integrated with Header Title This component replaces the standard header title with an integrated dropdown that displays "GeoServer [Doc Type]" and allows switching between documentation types. Configuration: - config.extra.doc_type: Current documentation type identifier - config.extra.doc_switcher: List of available documentation types Requirements: 1.2, 2.1, 2.2 #} {% if config.extra.doc_switcher %} {% set current_doc_type = config.extra.doc_type | default('') %} {# Find the label for the current documentation type #} {% set current_doc_label = namespace(value='Documentation') %} {% for doc in config.extra.doc_switcher %} {% if doc.type == current_doc_type %} {% set current_doc_label.value = doc.label %} {% endif %} {% endfor %} {# Integrated header title with dropdown #}
{% for doc in config.extra.doc_switcher %} GeoServer {{ doc.label }} {% endfor %}
{% else %} {# Fallback to standard header title if no switcher config #}
{{ config.site_name }}
{% endif %}
